title: OccupancyState
description: Zone occupancy state change event. VACANT_CONFIRMED is the only valid vacancy state.

zone_id.description: Unique identifier of the monitored zone.

state.description: Current occupancy state. Only VACANT_CONFIRMED is treated as confirmed vacancy.

previous_state.description: Previous occupancy state before this transition.

confidence.description: Confidence score of the state determination.

source_camera_ids.description: Camera IDs that contributed to this determination.

dwell_seconds.description: Duration in seconds the zone has been in this state.
